meaning: n.山楂,吆喝牲畜左转,瞬膜,呃vt.使向左转vi.向左转,支吾
examples: Pinocchio screamed with pain and as he screamed he brayed: Haw!
Instead of moans and cries, they burst forth into loud donkey brays, which sounded very much like, Haw!
I made this haw jelly cake myself.
Both Mr Haw and Ms Tucker were arrested and taken into custody but were later released.
The libraries affected are Bagshot, Bramley, Byfleet, Ewell Court, Lingfield, New Haw, Stoneleigh, Tattenhams, Virginia Water and Warlingham.
